levels.name: Mirror Steps
levels.author: Shadow Box Team
levels.description: A gentle staircase with a long side cast and a bright edge star.

levels.name: Low Signal
levels.author: Shadow Box Team
levels.description: The light sits high to the right, pulling the shadow into tighter left-side pickups.

levels.name: Underlit Lift

levels.description: A moving platform gives the shadow a sharper angle from below.
